title: apiTask
description: Task is the work that needs to be done for labeling the inputs in an app.

created_at.description:
When the task was created.
The format is https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc3339.txt.
Example: "2006-01-02T15:04:05.999999Z".

modified_at.description:
Most recent time when the task was updated.
The format is https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc3339.txt.
Example: "2006-01-02T15:04:05.999999Z".

concept_ids.description:
List of concept ids used in the work of this task.
DEPRECATED: Use task.concepts instead.

input_source.description: List of inputs used in this task will be taken from this source.

sample_ms.title: For model predictions on video: Sample delay for video predicting (1 frame per N milliseconds)

name.description: Add a title for this task to quickly recognise it in a list of tasks.

visibility.description:
The visibility field represents whether this message is privately/publicly visible.
To be visible to the public the App that contains it AND the User that contains the App must
also be publicly visible.

app_id.description: The app the task belongs to.

user_id.description: The user the task belongs to.

label_order_id.description: The label order the task belongs to.

concepts.description: Ignore Task.concept_ids field if Task.TaskConcept are supplied.

delete_previous_annotations.title:
Specify whether existing Annotations within the same app that are generated by other auto annotation tasks
with the specified Concept from the selected Model or Workflow should deleted before executing the Task

metrics.description: Tasks metrics are filled in upon user-request.

metadata.title:
To handle arbitrary json metadata you can use a struct field:
https://github.com/google/protobuf/blob/master/src/google/protobuf/struct.proto
